div.h2: x86_64 Error Return Detection: The [−4095, −1] Range

p.strong: Why retval < 0 is wrong — and what to use instead

g.text: 64-bit Signed Integer Space (rax at syscall-exit stop)

text.tspan: Success with no data (e.g. close(), mprotect())
NOT an error — lseek() to offset 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFF000
NAIVE CHECK: retval < 0 → WRONG (flags as error!)
CORRECT CHECK: −4096 < −4095 → NOT in band → SUCCESS
NAIVE CHECK: retval < 0 → correctly flags error
a high virtual address cast to signed
